# Landmark Educational Tours

> Landmark Educational Tours is a full-service student travel company that plans and operates safe, fully customized, curriculum-aligned educational field trips and group tours for schools, teachers, and youth organizations across the United States and internationally. Every trip is private to your group, hand-built by a dedicated Travel Consultant, and managed end to end (itinerary, transportation, accommodations, guides, meals, and 24/7 support).

Key facts:
- Company: Landmark Educational Tours (student & educational group travel)
- Serves: K-12 schools, private and independent schools, teachers, group leaders, scouts, and youth organizations
- Model: private group tours, fully customized to each group's curriculum, grade level, budget, and dates
- Location: 1 Central Street, Suite 205, Middleton, MA 01949 · Phone: 888-886-2781 · Email: Hello@landmarkeducationaltours.com
- Registration: California Seller of Travel CST 2168995-50
- What's included: private group tour, custom itinerary, transportation, hotels, attractions, meals, professional tour manager, and gratuities
- Differentiators: real human Travel Consultants (not AI-generated itineraries), safety-first planning, overnight security available, flexible in-trip changes, and full logistics handled so educators can focus on students

## Destinations (United States)
- [Washington, D.C.](https://landmarkeducationaltours.com/usa-trips/washington-dc/): monuments, Smithsonian museums, U.S. Capitol, Arlington, civics and history
- [New York City](https://landmarkeducationaltours.com/usa-trips/new-york-city/): museums, Broadway and performing arts, landmarks
- [Boston](https://landmarkeducationaltours.com/usa-trips/boston/): Freedom Trail, colonial history, universities, Salem and Newport add-ons
- [Philadelphia](https://landmarkeducationaltours.com/usa-trips/philadelphia/): Independence Hall, the Liberty Bell, the birthplace of America
- [Atlanta](https://landmarkeducationaltours.com/usa-trips/atlanta/): Civil Rights Movement, HBCU campus tours, Southern culture
- [Orlando](https://landmarkeducationaltours.com/usa-trips/orlando/): STEM, Kennedy Space Center, theme-park learning
- [Chicago](https://landmarkeducationaltours.com/usa-trips/chicago/), [New Orleans](https://landmarkeducationaltours.com/usa-trips/new-orleans/), [San Antonio](https://landmarkeducationaltours.com/usa-trips/san-antonio/), [Charleston](https://landmarkeducationaltours.com/usa-trips/charleston/), [Savannah](https://landmarkeducationaltours.com/usa-trips/savannah/), [Williamsburg](https://landmarkeducationaltours.com/usa-trips/williamsburg/), [Mackinac Island](https://landmarkeducationaltours.com/usa-trips/mackinac-island/), [New Mexico](https://landmarkeducationaltours.com/usa-trips/new-mexico/), [Los Angeles](https://landmarkeducationaltours.com/usa-trips/los-angeles/), [Seattle](https://landmarkeducationaltours.com/usa-trips/seattle/)
- [All U.S. destinations](https://landmarkeducationaltours.com/usa-trips/)

## Destinations (International)
- [Canada](https://landmarkeducationaltours.com/international/canada/) (Quebec City, Montreal, French immersion), [Italy](https://landmarkeducationaltours.com/international/italy/), [Costa Rica](https://landmarkeducationaltours.com/international/costa-rica/), [Norway](https://landmarkeducationaltours.com/international/norway/), [Ireland](https://landmarkeducationaltours.com/international/ireland/), [England](https://landmarkeducationaltours.com/international/england/), [France](https://landmarkeducationaltours.com/international/france/), [Japan](https://landmarkeducationaltours.com/international/japan/), [South Korea](https://landmarkeducationaltours.com/international/south-korea/)
- [All international destinations](https://landmarkeducationaltours.com/international/)

## Trip themes
- [Browse all themes](https://landmarkeducationaltours.com/themes/): HBCU campus tours, US history and civics, performing arts, Spanish and French immersion, African American history, Scouts, Yellowstone, and private-school programs

## Plan a trip
- [Get a free quote](https://landmarkeducationaltours.com/get-a-quote/): tell us about your group and receive a custom, no-obligation quote
- [Plan a trip / book a call](https://landmarkeducationaltours.com/plan-a-trip/): talk to a Travel Consultant
- [Contact us](https://landmarkeducationaltours.com/contact-us/)
